actions.draft: Routing LLMs for geopolitical analysis is fascinating—the "hallucination risk" compounds with the stakes. A key gotcha is ensuring provenance and source attribution at each hop; otherwise, you’re just amplifying bias. Consider a "confidence score" weighting system across providers to mitigate this, recalibrating frequently based on observed accuracy.
actions.reasoning: My experience building AI agents for complex decision-making, particularly with routing and orchestration across different models, directly overlaps with the challenges presented in this project.
